description: Distinct Initializer agent prompt that runs once at project genesis; produces feature_list.json, init.sh, harness-progress.txt, first commit. Coding-agent prompt for all subsequent sessions.
steps: Manually run scripts/validate-scaffold.sh against a throwaway project; confirm artifacts produced

description: feature_list.json is the source of truth for project completion. JSON schema enforced. Entries append-only; only passes field flips, and only after E2E verification.
steps: Register in PreToolUse Edit + Write matcher in settings.json
Hand-test: attempt to delete an entry → exit code 2
Hand-test: attempt to rewrite description → exit code 2
Hand-test: flip a single passes field → accepted

description: Stop-event hook intercepts agent exit when feature_list.json has any passes:false. Decision tree per BRD §3.3.
steps: Register Stop event block in settings.json
Hand-test: open a session with one failing feature, attempt to exit → reminder reinjected

description: Per-workflow LLM routing replaces all-agents-on-Opus. config/workflows.yaml is source of truth. Agents reference {{model:<workflow>}} placeholders.
steps: Create config/workflows.yaml with the §3.4 table verbatim
Update all 12 agent files to use {{model:<workflow>}} placeholders
Add a placeholder resolver (vendored from opendev-py factory pattern)
Hand-test: trigger a session, confirm routing log shows the bound model

description: /plan command spawns a Planner subagent with a read-only tool schema (no Write/Edit/Bash-mutate). Plan written to scratch/plans/.
steps: Create agents/planner.md with read-only tool schema declaration
Hand-test: spawn /plan, confirm Edit attempts are denied at the SDK level

description: Six-phase ReAct loop (pre-check, thinking, self-critique, action, tool, post). thinking_level configurable per workflow.
steps: Hand-test: run a workflow with thinking_level=high, confirm CoT trace appears in telemetry

description: PostToolUse hook appends budget regime footer (NORMAL/CONSERVE/HIGH/CRITICAL) to every tool result. Mechanical, no prompt engineering.
steps: Patch hooks/cost-tracker.js to emit a stable JSON line per call
Register budget-footer.js after cost-tracker.js in PostToolUse
Hand-test: run a high-volume task, confirm footer appears and regime transitions at 60/80/95% thresholds

description: PreToolUse hook blocks any passes:false→true flip on feature_list.json unless a verification artifact is committed in git under verification/<feature_id>.{png,json}.
steps: Register e2e-gate.js before feature-edit-guard.js in PreToolUse Edit + Write
Confirm Playwright MCP server is declared in .claude-plugin/plugin.json
Hand-test: attempt passes flip without artifact → exit code 2; with artifact → accepted

description: Five-layer defense-in-depth: prompt guardrails, schema-level tool gating, runtime approval, tool-level validation, lifecycle hooks. Existing permission classifier is Layer 3; existing 19 hooks are Layer 5.
steps: Map the existing permission classifier to Layer 3
Hand-test: each layer fails independently without compromising the others

description: PreToolUse reminder injector. Reminders live in prompts/reminders/ as small Markdown snippets, picked based on tool + args.
steps: Create prompts/reminders/ with snippets for each BRD §4.2 decision point
Hand-test: trigger an Edit on production code, confirm style reminder appears

description: Five-stage progressive compaction (50/65/75/85/92% budget). Compactor subagent uses Haiku. Original transcripts archived before summarization.
steps: Wire to SDK auto_compact / PreCompact events
Hand-test: load context to each threshold, confirm correct stage fires

description: Stop-hook mines session for {tool sequence → outcome} tuples. Scores by frequency × success_rate × novelty. Promotes high-scoring patterns to instincts/.
steps: Hand-test: run two sessions, confirm pending instincts appear

description: Sessions stored as trees, not lists. /tree, /fork, /branch, /export commands. All branches in one sessions/<project>/<id>.json file.
steps: Implement the tree algorithm (read-and-reimplement of Pi pattern, ~400 lines)
Hand-test: /fork mid-session, confirm both branches save to one file

description: Skills resolved in priority order: project-local → user-global → built-in. SKILL.md frontmatter convention adopted.
steps: Adopt anthropics/skills SKILL.md frontmatter on every existing skill in skills/
Hand-test: place a project-local override, confirm it wins

description: Failed ratchet triggers Spec-Auditor subagent that walks back through phases to find the earliest spec gap, proposes amendment.
steps: Vendor kingofevil/forge spec-backprop subagent (pinned commit, audited)
Hand-test: cause phase-7 failure, confirm spec amendment proposed

description: Every ratchet checkpoint stores a state_snapshot (git SHA + feature_list_hash + eval scores). Regression on any dimension triggers keep-or-revert decision; default revert.
steps: Extend state/eval-scores.json schema with snapshot fields
Patch scripts/validate-evals.sh to compute new dimensions
Hand-test: cause lint regression, confirm revert and log entry

description: agents/initializer.md — adapted from anthropics/claude-quickstarts/autonomous-coding/prompts/initializer_prompt.md.
agents/coding-agent.md — adapted from anthropics/claude-quickstarts/autonomous-coding/prompts/coding_prompt.md.
agents/planner.md — read-only subagent for /plan command.
steps: Create file with read-only tool schema declaration

description: agents/critic.md — GAN-pair critic, distinct from agents/code-reviewer.md.
agents/spec-auditor.md — backprop subagent.
agents/compactor.md — Haiku, read+summarize, for stage 3-5 compaction.
agents/e2e-runner.md — Sonnet, Playwright/Puppeteer MCP only.
steps: Restrict tool schema to browser MCP + Read

description: agents/doc-updater.md — Sonnet, Read+Write on docs/ only.
skills/iterative-retrieval/SKILL.md — progressive context refinement for subagents.
skills/cross-provider-handoff/SKILL.md — mid-session model switch preserving thinking blocks.
hooks/ralph-loop.js — Stop event, exit interception.
hooks/feature-edit-guard.js — PreToolUse Edit + Write, denies non-flip edits to feature_list.json.
hooks/e2e-gate.js — PreToolUse Edit, requires verification artifact for passes flip.
hooks/budget-footer.js — PostToolUse all matchers, appends regime footer.
hooks/reminder-injector.js — PreToolUse, injects targeted reminders by tool + args.
hooks/compaction-stage.js — Pre-LLM-call, triggers compaction stages 1-5.
hooks/instinct-extractor.js — Stop event, mines session for pattern candidates.
hooks/experiment-logger.js — fires after validate-evals.sh, records keep/revert decision.
/feature-add — Critic-validated entry proposal.
/feature-status — pass/fail counts.
/plan — spawn Planner subagent.
/tree — navigate session graph.
/fork — branch session.
/instinct-status — show pending/confirmed instincts.
/evolve — cluster instincts into skills.
/spec-audit — manually trigger spec backprop.
/model — switch model mid-session.
steps: Use Pi cross-provider handoff under the hood

description: /cost — per-session breakdown by workflow.
/recipe-run <yaml> — execute a YAML recipe (Goose pattern).
Every LLM call tagged with {workflow, model, session_id, feature_id}. Vendor Pi's per-provider pricing table; reimplement ledger writer to fit state/cost-log.json schema.
steps: Patch hooks/cost-tracker.js to emit tagged entries

description: On Anthropic rate-limit or outage, Critic/Spec-Auditor → GPT-5 or Gemini 2.5 Pro; Coding-Agent → Bedrock or Vertex; Compaction → GPT-5-mini fallback.
steps: Depend on @mariozechner/pi-ai or port the failover decision tree
Hand-test: simulate Anthropic 429, confirm failover route taken

description: Scaffold command asks Q0 (Q&A | artifacts | hybrid) and routes imported BRD/Architecture into specs/ without interview. Markdown-only in this increment.
steps: Add Q0 to commands/scaffold.md before Q1
Update skills/brd/SKILL.md to early-exit on specs/brd/.imported
Update agents/brd-creator.md pre-flight to early-exit on sentinel
Update skills/architect/SKILL.md to set --from-import on specs/design/.imported
Verify three test scaffolds: Q&A, import, hybrid (per BRD v3.1 §2 verification)

description: Architect runs in synthesis mode when --from-import is set: reads imported BRD + architecture, skips 11-round interview, produces full design artifacts directly.
steps: Add Phase 0 mode detection to agents/architect.md
Add Step 0 mode detection to skills/architect/SKILL.md
Verify: --from-import skips Rounds 1-11, design artifacts produced

description: After interview or synthesis, architect presents a single architecture-review document for approve/amend/restart. 3-cycle amend budget. On approve, emit handoff state for /auto.
steps: Implement 3-cycle amend budget with restart fallback
Update hooks/session-start.js to surface /auto suggestion on next session
Verify all 5 paths per BRD v3.1 §3 verification

description: HARNESS.md + harness-manifest.json + validate-harness-manifest.js. Every agent/skill/hook/command is a row in {maintainability, architecture, behaviour, traceability} × {planning, session, commit, integration, drift} matrix. Validator runs in CI; empty cells are documented gaps.
steps: Author scripts/validate-harness-manifest.js with schema + coverage matrix
Verify: 69/69 rows validate, 0 missing wired_at paths, coverage matrix prints, empty cells match documented v3.2 deferrals

description: Top-level worktree block in settings.json (bgIsolation: worktree, baseRef: head, symlinkDirectories). Prevents parallel subagent file collisions. Documented in scaffold.md Step 4.
steps: Verify parallel Task spawns run in isolated worktrees

description: hooks/pre-bash-gate.js (extracts bash write targets, applies sensitive-path + scope rules) + hooks/concurrency-gate.js (caps parallel Task/Agent at 18, TTL-prunes leaked spawns) + templates/git-hooks/{pre-commit,prepare-commit-msg} installed by scaffold Step 10.
steps: Wire hooks into settings.json (PreToolUse Bash, PreToolUse Agent|Task, SubagentStop)
Update commands/scaffold.md Step 10 to install real git hooks
Verify: benign bash allowed, .env write blocked, sed -i .env blocked, tee credentials blocked, concurrency cap enforced at 18, CONCURRENCY_CAP env overrides

description: /context command + scripts/{context-pack,context-retrieve,search-compact,run-compact}.js + hooks/token-advisor.js. CCR pipeline with hash-cached raw output under state/context-cache/. Advisory hook (never blocks) warns on avoidable broad Reads/Bashes/Globs, rate-limited to 3 warnings per session.
steps: Author scripts/context-pack.js (execFileSync only — no shell interpolation)
Verify: cache hit on repeat call, duplicate Read advisory fires, wide find advisory fires, targeted find allowed, no shell interpolation vulns

description: skills/triage/SKILL.md + commands/triage.md. New surface specs/triage/inbox.md — pre-work queue for discovery automations, drift sensors, human notes. Sub-commands: add/list/promote/archive. Distinct from feature_list.json (committed work).
steps: Verify /triage add creates specs/triage/inbox.md if missing, appends item with T-YYYY-MM-DD-NN id
Verify /triage promote invokes /feature-add and marks item promoted

description: recipes/example-morning-triage.yaml + templates/github-workflows/scheduled-triage.yml. Weekday 07:30 discovery pass writes to specs/triage/inbox.md and opens a PR via peter-evans/create-pull-request.
steps: Verify recipe runs and appends a note to specs/triage/inbox.md

description: skills/code-map/SKILL.md + scripts/build-code-graph.js (JS/TS/Python/Markdown regex parsers) + hooks/verify-on-save.js (PostToolUse dirty-file ledger) + hooks/graph-refresh.js (Stop event incremental refresh) + agents/codebase-explorer.md (read-only, no Write/Edit).
steps: Author scripts/build-code-graph.js (execFileSync git ls-files; regex parsers)
Wire verify-on-save into PostToolUse(Edit|Write), graph-refresh into Stop chain
Verify: full build 253 forge files, 3201 defines, ~80ms; incremental refresh; skip patterns; JSON valid

description: scripts/parse-structurizr.js + scripts/parse-plantuml-c4.js + scripts/parse-mermaid-c4.js. All three normalize to a common IR (containers/components/relationships/external_systems/notes). Wired into scaffold-import Q0 Branch B.
steps: Update skills/scaffold-import/SKILL.md dispatch bash + markdown fallback renderer
Verify all three parsers extract same shape from equivalent fixture (3 containers, 4 rels, 2 external systems)

description: skills/memory-os/SKILL.md + core/recall/archival scripts. 3-tier: core-blocks (always-in-context, 4KB cap, agent-writable) / sessions.jsonl (compactor writes, recall search) / archival (agent notes, BM25 search). SessionStart hook injects core-blocks into every session reminder.
steps: Update hooks/session-start.js to inject Core memory section (12KB cap)
Verify: write→read→list; 4KB cap enforced; archival BM25 ranks correctly; SessionStart shows core blocks

description: skills/memory-os/vector-backend.md — design-only interface spec for --backend {mem0,letta,zep}. No vendor SDK code. Decision deferred until v3.1.11 filesystem tier has been used on ≥2 dogfood projects.
steps: Author skills/memory-os/vector-backend.md with contract, response schema, sync semantics, MCP-server survey, migration path, open decisions

description: brd/v3.1-dogfood-runbook.md — end-to-end runbook for the salary-dashboard test project. Exercises v3.1.1 through v3.1.11 via Branch B artifact import (Structurizr DSL), architect synthesis + review, memory-OS core write, /context, /triage, harness registry validator, defensive triad, AAC parser round-trip. Actual execution requires an interactive session.
steps: Author brd/v3.1-dogfood-runbook.md with per-increment step mapping
Prepare fixture BRD.md + Structurizr DSL for /tmp/salary-dashboard-imports/
Produce verification/v3.1.1-.11.json artifacts + flip passes:false→true for those entries
Write specs/dogfood-report-v3.1.md summarizing what worked, what didn't, v3.2 candidates

description: state/learned-rules.md is injected into every SessionStart reminder and read verbatim by coding-agent/planner/critic/spec-writer/generator. Fast-lane rule store distinct from instincts/ (which is Critic-gated). Security: symlink guard + realpath project-scope check + PROJECT CONTENT framing wrapper against prompt injection.
steps: Extend state/learned-rules.md seed with v3.2.1 header + Rules section
hooks/session-start.js: read learned-rules.md, wrap with PROJECT CONTENT delimiter, 16KB cap, symlink+realpath guards
agents/coding-agent.md: step 3a added to startup sequence
agents/planner.md, critic.md, spec-writer.md: read-and-apply step added
Verify: injection works with 3 seeded rules, empty seed produces no block, symlink to /etc/passwd rejected, prompt-injection framing wrapper present

description: Bounded 3-instance majority-vote re-verification at merge boundary. New /critic-vote command + orchestrator script + hooks/e2e-gate.js consumption. Fail-safe: non-returning voter counts as BLOCK. Enforcement opt-in via E2E_GATE_ENFORCE_VOTES=1 (warn-only default for v3.2 rollout).
steps: Author scripts/critic-vote.js (orchestrator polls state/critic-votes/*.json, computes per-axis 2-of-3 majority, writes verification/<id>.votes.json)
Extend hooks/e2e-gate.js to consume votes.json with E2E_GATE_ENFORCE_VOTES gate
Axes: correctness / spec-scope / e2e-artifact + optional security (deterministic trigger on auth/secrets/upload/migration/payment keywords)
Verify: 3-way unanimous PASS → APPROVED, 2-of-3 BLOCK on any axis → BLOCKED, voter timeout counts as BLOCK, e2e-gate warns default, blocks under enforcement

description: 4-level sensor arbitration taxonomy (hard-block / self-correct / review-focus / advisory) + waiver JSON schema + check-waiver.js helper. Reference wiring: hooks/pre-bash-gate.js consults check-waiver before blocking. Other 11 hard-block hooks documented, waiver wiring is mechanical follow-up.
steps: Author docs/sensor-arbitration.md with taxonomy + classification of all 27+ hooks
Author templates/sensor-waivers.schema.json (JSON schema, required fields + expiry mandatory)
Wire hooks/pre-bash-gate.js to consult check-waiver with __dirname-fallback resolution
Verify: active waiver honored with audit line, expired waiver rejected, subject mismatch rejected

description: 3 scripts: impact-scope.js (blast radius via code-graph reverse-BFS + feature-owning-file mapping), regression-gate.js (full-sweep re-check of every previously-passing feature's verification artifact), local-regression-gate.js (impact-scoped variant). Closes G15/G16 gap our BRD §3.8 E2E gate leaves open.
steps: Author scripts/impact-scope.js (uses state/code-graph.json import edges, --files/--staged/--files modes)
Verify: helper.js edit → helper+main impacted, unrelated not impacted; regression-gate detects deleted artifact; local variant writes per-feature artifact

description: Khononov 3-axis Balanced Coupling formal rule injected into critic + code-reviewer + architecture-review template. Reference doc at skills/critic/references/balanced-coupling.md with truth table, 3 worked examples, report shape. Replaces prose-level architectural judgment with a published rule.
steps: agents/critic.md: What-to-check adds Balanced Coupling bullet
agents/code-reviewer.md: new section + severity ladder updated (worst-case = BLOCK)
Verify: rule present in all 4 files

description: TRACE compiled-rule enforcement (arXiv 2606.13174). hooks/rule-gate.js (PreToolUse Edit|Write|Bash) evaluates pattern-kind compiled rules from state/compiled-rules.json against pending content; blocks on a confirmed-severity match, warns on tentative. Fail-open on malformed rules. Closes the enforcement gap the advisory learned-rules.md lane (v3.2.1) leaves open.
steps: Author state/compiled-rules.json seed (empty, monotonic, versioned schema)
Author hooks/rule-gate.js (pattern match on Edit new_string / Write content / Bash command; block vs warn by severity; skip malformed rules; exit 0 on internal error)
Wire rule-gate.js into settings.json PreToolUse Edit|Write and PreToolUse Bash
Verify with a hand-authored AWS-key block rule: violating Write blocked with rule reason, benign Write passes, malformed compiled-rules.json fails open

description: TRACE acquisition half. hooks/correction-detector.js (Stop, after instinct-extractor) mines state/rejections.jsonl for repeated Critic/gate rejections (source A: Critic BLOCK + failed ratchet gates), groups by normalized reason, and writes rule candidates (with a synthesized pattern check, or semantic fallback) to state/rule-candidates/. Never writes to compiled-rules.json or skills/. Adapter-shaped so a human-chat source (option C) is additive later.
steps: Author hooks/correction-detector.js (group rejections seen >=2 times; synthesize pattern from excerpt or mark semantic; dedup via state/.rule-candidate-hashes.txt)
Wire log-rejection producers: agents/critic.md on BLOCK, hooks/e2e-gate.js, hooks/feature-edit-guard.js, security-review + code-reviewer gates
Wire correction-detector.js into settings.json Stop chain after instinct-extractor.js
Verify: a session with a repeated security-review BLOCK yields a candidate with a synthesized pattern check in state/rule-candidates/

description: TRACE curation lane. commands/rules.md + scripts/rule-compile.js promote candidate -> tentative(warn) -> confirmed(block) mirroring /evolve, Critic-validated. No auto-promotion past candidate without Critic; tentative->confirmed only via recurrence (>=2 sessions) with 0 false-positive overrides; user reviews the staged compiled-rules.json diff before any rule reaches block severity.
steps: Author scripts/rule-compile.js (status / promote-candidates / promote-tentative / compile / prune-candidates)
Author commands/rules.md documenting the lifecycle + hard rules (copy /evolve guarantees)
Wire Critic validation per candidate (real pattern, no obvious false positives on sample matches)
Implement false-positive override tracking: a rule with >0 overrides cannot auto-promote to block
Verify: candidate -> tentative(warn) -> confirmed(block) with recurrence; /rules compile stages a reviewable diff; --force bypass gated

description: skills/compiled-rules/SKILL.md reference skill + semantic-rule enforcement path. Documents the two-store model (advisory learned-rules.md vs enforced compiled-rules.json), the pattern-vs-semantic split, hand-authoring, and the false-positive override contract. Extends agents/critic.md to read semantic-kind compiled rules and apply each as a hard filter (same treatment it gives learned-rules.md).
steps: Author skills/compiled-rules/SKILL.md (frontmatter name/description/when_to_use/brd_ref; body mirrors skills/instinct-extraction/SKILL.md shape)
Extend agents/critic.md Read-Context step to also read check.kind==semantic rules from compiled-rules.json
Update CLAUDE.md component table + hook/skill/command counts; add brd/v3.3.md section
Verify: a semantic compiled rule is applied by the Critic as a hard filter

description: state/compiled-rules.json seed + state/rule-candidates/ dir + hooks/lib/log-rejection.js shared producer helper. Defensive appendRejection that never throws; ts-stamped records into state/rejections.jsonl for correction-detector to mine.
steps: Seed state/compiled-rules.json with version 3.3.0 and empty rules[]
Smoke: appendRejection writes, defensive on bad input, findProjectRoot walks up

description: hooks/rule-gate.js PreToolUse hook evaluates pattern rules (regex / substring / forbid-substring) against Edit/Write/Bash content and hard-blocks when severity=block, warns when severity=warn. RULE_GATE_OVERRIDE=<rule_id> escape hatch downgrades block and increments false_positive_overrides (locks the rule out of auto-promotion). Fail-open on malformed rules.
steps: Author hooks/rule-gate.js with pattern evaluation + glob matching + override handler
Wire into settings.json PreToolUse Edit|Write AND Bash matchers
Smoke: 7 scenarios (block on regex, benign pass, path filter, tentative warn, override + FP counter, Bash rule, malformed rules fail-open)

description: hooks/correction-detector.js Stop-event hook. Reads state/rejections.jsonl, groups by normalized reason+source, emits candidate JSON to state/rule-candidates/ for groups with >=2 recurrences. Synthesizes pattern (regex library + LCS + known-pattern detection) or falls back to semantic. Dedup via state/.rule-candidate-hashes.txt. Defensive: exit 0 on any error.
steps: Wire into settings.json Stop chain (after instinct-extractor)
Instrument producers: hooks/e2e-gate.js + hooks/feature-edit-guard.js call appendRejection on BLOCK
Add instructions to agents/critic.md + agents/security-reviewer.md + agents/code-reviewer.md to call appendRejection on BLOCK findings
Smoke: 5 scenarios (2 recurrences → candidate with regex, single → no candidate, dedup, semantic fallback, producer wiring)

description: scripts/rule-compile.js + commands/rules.md — /rules {status | promote-candidates | promote-tentative | compile | prune-candidates | set-critic-verdict}. Lifecycle: candidate → tentative(warn) requires Critic pass; tentative → confirmed(block) requires sessions_seen>=2 AND false_positive_overrides==0. --force bypass for both gates. compile stages diff; human commits.
steps: Smoke: 9 scenarios (status, promote without Critic → 0, set-critic-verdict + promote → 1 tentative, block verdict → no promote, promote-tentative + FP guard, --force override, prune >30d, compile wrapper)

description: agents/critic.md consumes semantic compiled rules (check.kind==='semantic'), applying each as a hard filter and BLOCK/needs-revision on violation. hooks/session-start.js surfaces active tentative + confirmed compiled rules in the SessionStart reminder (pattern rules annotated 'pattern/rule-gate', semantic 'semantic/Critic') so non-Critic agents know what to avoid pre-iteration.
steps: Extend agents/critic.md What-you-receive with semantic-rule reading step
Extend hooks/session-start.js to inject compiled-rules block after learned-rules
Smoke: empty rules → no block, mixed pattern+semantic → both cited + escape-hatch documented, coexists with learned-rules

description: skills/compiled-rules/SKILL.md — two-store model, pattern vs semantic, lifecycle, hand-authoring, escape hatch, gate checklist. CLAUDE.md BRD v3.0 additions table gains a TRACE row. harness-manifest.json gains 8 new rows for the v3.3 components. feature_list.json entries appended.
steps: Update CLAUDE.md BRD v3.0 additions table
Append 8 v3.3 rows to harness-manifest.json + validate
